    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AudioManager
    Manages all audio operations for the game.
    AudioManager
    Manages all audio operations for the game.
    Board
     
    Brick
     
    BrickGenerator
     
    BrickRotator
     
    ClearRow
     
    ColorStrategy
     
    CountdownManager
    Manages the countdown sequence before starting a game.
    DownData
     
    EventSource
     
    EventType
     
    GameConstants
    Centralized game constants to avoid magic numbers throughout the codebase.
    GameController
     
    GameLoopManager
    Manages game loop timelines and movement logic.
    GameLoopManager.CountdownCallbacks
     
    GameLoopManager.GarbageProcessingCallbacks
     
    GameLoopManager.MoveDownCallbacks
     
    GameOverPanel
     
    GameStateManager
    Manages game state transitions and flags.
    GameView
     
    GameViewRenderer
    Centralized rendering class for all game view rendering operations.
    GarbageManager
    Manages garbage block sending and processing in multiplayer mode.
    GarbageManager.GameOverCallback
    Callback interface for triggering game over.
    GarbageQueue
    Manages a queue of pending garbage lines that will be added to the playfield.
    GuiController
     
    HighScoreManager
     
    InputEventListener
     
    InputHandler
    Handles all keyboard input for the game, processing key events for both single player and multiplayer modes.
    InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
    Callback interface for multiplayer actions.
    InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks
    Callback interface for single player actions.
    KeyBindingsManager
     
    KeyBindingsManager.Action
     
    KeyBindingsManager.PlayerMode
     
    Main
     
    MainMenuPanel
     
    MatrixOperations
     
    MoveEvent
     
    MultiplayerScreen
     
    MultiplayerViewManager
    Manages multiplayer view operations and UI state transitions.
    MultiplayerViewManager.GameControllerFactory
     
    MultiplayerViewManager.GameControllerSyncCallback
     
    MultiplayerViewManager.OriginalPanelSyncCallback
     
    NextShapeInfo
     
    NotificationPanel
     
    PanelCoordinator
    Coordinates visibility and management of all UI panels in the game.
    PausePanel
     
    PausePanelActionHandler
    Handles all pause panel action setup and execution.
    RandomBrickGenerator
     
    Score
     
    SettingsController
     
    SettingsPanel
     
    SettingsPanel.RebindingInfo
     
    SimpleBoard
     
    SinglePlayerScreen
     
    SinglePlayerViewManager
    Manages single player view operations and UI state transitions.
    TimerManager
    Manages game timers for single player and multiplayer modes.
    ViewData
     
    WinningPanel
